mapper.sql: id, document_id, content, chunk_index, chunk_type, source, vector_synced, keywords, metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY chunk_index ASC

SELECT FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE status = 'active' AND ( content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY chunk_index ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT FROM knowledge_chunks WHERE content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY chunk_index ASC LIMIT #{limit}
